design_philosophy.core_loop: Select race/season mode → adjust car setup (spoilers, tyres, gearbox) → compete against 11 AI-driven real F1 drivers → manage mandatory pit stops with tyre changes based on weather → complete race and progress through season
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Real-time vehicle handling and positioning against licensed F1 drivers while managing dynamic weather conditions and mandatory pit strategy
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Drive as Nigel Mansell during his championship-winning 1992 season, competing authentically against historical F1 rivals with realistic team affiliation and national representation
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Enforces mandatory pit stops with weather-dependent tyre selection (hard/soft/rain), rejecting simulation abstractions. Personalizes Mansell with signature visual identity (mustache, cap, blue suit) while genericizing all rivals. Includes national anthem podium celebrations tied to winner nationality, treating geopolitical identity as integral design element

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Pre-race customization of car setup (spoilers, tyres, gearbox) and tyre strategy selection during mandatory pit stops allow players to modulate challenge through preparation and tactical decision-making

progression.upgrade_system: Pre-race car customization system: spoilers, tyres, gearbox adjustments available before each race
progression.unlock_mechanism: Season mode progression through 1992 F1 calendar races; single race mode available immediately; practice mode for track familiarization
replayability_hooks: Custom driver creation with selectable nationality from 18 countries (retains Mansell appearance)
Multiple play modes (single race, season mode, practice)
Competing against 11 real historical F1 drivers with individual team colours

world_building_techniques: Licensed 1992 F1 season calendar with authentic team colors
Named rival drivers as competitors (not generic AI)
National anthem playback tied to podium winner's country
Selectable player nationalities with corresponding anthems
Character visual differentiation: Mansell features signature mustache/cap + blue suit; rivals wear generic yellow suits

faction_indicators: Team affiliation through authentic constructor colours
National identity selection during driver creation
danger_signals: 11 competing drivers with distinct team affiliations create rival faction dynamics
environmental_storytelling: Authentic 1992 F1 calendar creates historical context
Dynamic weather system suggests environmental hazards (tyre selection consequences)
Pit lane mandatory stops reinforce strategic resource management
